meta.title: Daily Page - Support
meta.description: Support Daily Page financially, contribute to the open-source project, report issues, get in touch, or request a new room.

hero.title: Help keep this little writing space online.
hero.tagline: Daily Page is an open-source, indie project. A few steady contributions go a long way toward hosting, email, storage, maintenance, and the quiet work of keeping it useful.

funding.p1: The current goal is to raise $20 each month to cover the basic costs of running the site.
funding.p2: The progress meter reflects confirmed recurring monthly support. One-time support is welcome too, but the meter tracks the monthly sustainability goal.

meter.label: Progress this month
meter.note: Updated as confirmed monthly support changes.
meter.ariaLabel: Monthly funding progress: {raised} raised of {goal}, {percent} percent.

goalReached.h2: The monthly goal is covered. Thank you!
goalReached.p1: Recurring support now covers Daily Page’s {goal} monthly baseline.
goalReached.p2: Additional support is still welcome and helps build a cushion for unexpected costs, maintenance, and future improvements.
goalReached.meterNote: Thank you for helping cover the monthly baseline.
goalReached.meterAriaLabel: Monthly funding goal reached: {raised} pledged against a {goal} goal.

openSource.p1: Daily Page is developed in public. You can read the code, report bugs, suggest features, or open a pull request.

code.label: Browse the code
code.text: to see how the site works and where it is headed.

issues.label: Use issues
issues.text: for bugs, rough edges, accessibility problems, translation gaps, and feature ideas.

community.label: Contribute carefully
community.text: with fixes, documentation, translations, design polish, or small improvements that make writing here easier.

contact.p1: For private questions, account help, or anything that does not belong in a public issue, email is still the best route.

rooms.p1: Rooms keep Daily Page organized around shared topics. If there is a writing space you would like to see, send a request here.

form.errorGeneric: Failed to submit request. Please try again.
form.errorUnexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
